title: That Time In Minecraft
description: A That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime modpack based around Magic and Tech
body:
**That Time in Minecraft**  
Inspired by the anime *That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime*, this modpack immerses you in a limitless world where **magic meets technology**.

---

## **Overview**  
Built around **Tensura:Reincarnated**, this pack encourages you to:  
- **Adventure**, **build**, and **evolve**.  
- Create your very own **Jura Federation** and guide it into a new era.  

---

## **Key Features**

### **Meet The Core Mods**
- **Tensura:Reincarnated** The most core of the core mods!  
- **Mekanism**: Make your life easy and power the world.  
- **Thermal Series**: Master energy production and industrial processes.  
- **Create**: Design your steampunk Federation!  
- **Electrodynamics**: Dive into nuclear science and accidentally blow up your base!  

### **Magic Integration**  
The **magic** of Tensura:Reincarnated blends seamlessly with mods like Ice & Fire and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks. Build a world where medieval fantasy collides with cutting-edge tech, pushing your base beyond the nuclear age and into realms of science most can only dream about. The result is a truly **immersive** experience.  

### **Adventure Awaits**  
- Explore **vast detailed** with Terra and dive into multiple mysterious dimensions.  
- Subdue powerful creatures, turn them into allies, and build thriving settlements.  
- Face challenges to uncover hidden treasures.  

---

### SERVER OWNERS, Please Read
**Server Pack**   
I update this pack as both a **client pack** and a **server pack**. The client pack is the default, but **server owners** like you, should check the versions tab for the **"That Time In Minecraft Server"** pack that matches your client version.

**What’s different in the server pack?**  
Client-only mods are removed, so you can drop it straight into the server’s `mods/` folder.

**Server Ram**   
About **6–12 GB** should be on the server. I found the sweet spot to be around **9–12 GB**. More than ~12 GB usually **hurts performance** because of GC pauses.  

**server.properties**  
- Set worldgen: `level-type=terra:overworld/overworld`.  
  - If this gets changed after first boot, **delete the world folder** and restart the server. 
- Prevent false fly-kicks: `allow-flight=true`.

   
I know how much of a pain this can be sometimes, so I hope this helps! <3  

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Thank you to the Tensura:Dungeon devs for letting me use their mod in this pack.
</details>
